revision.text:
'''庚辰'''（かのえたつ、こうしん）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて17番目で、前は[[己卯]]、次は[[辛巳]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は金、[[十二支]]の五行は土で、[[五行思想#相生|相生]]（土生金）である。
==庚辰の年==
==庚辰の日== ===[[選日]]=== 庚辰の日は[[犯土|小土]]の4日目である。

'''庚辰'''（かのえたつ、こうしん）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて17番目で、前は[[己卯]]、次は[[辛巳]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は金、[[十二支]]の五行は土で、[[五行思想#相生|相生]]（土生金）である。
==庚辰の年==
==庚辰の日== ===[[選日]]=== 庚辰の日は[[犯土|小土]]の3日目である。

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''庚辰'''（かのえたつ、こうきんのたつ、こうしん）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの17番目で、前は[[己卯]]、次は[[辛巳]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[庚]]は陽の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[辰]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（土生金）である。
==庚辰の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って20が余る年が庚辰の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''庚辰の年''' |- ![[紀元前1千年紀]]!![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[紀元前941年]] *[[紀元前881年]] *[[紀元前821年]] *[[紀元前761年]] *[[紀元前701年]] *[[紀元前641年]] *[[紀元前581年]] *[[紀元前521年]] *[[紀元前461年]] *[[紀元前401年]] *[[紀元前341年]] *[[紀元前281年]] *[[紀元前221年]] *[[紀元前161年]] *[[紀元前101年]] *[[紀元前41年]] | *[[20年]] *[[80年]] *[[140年]] *[[200年]] *[[260年]] *[[320年]] *[[380年]] *[[440年]] *[[500年]] *[[560年]] *[[620年]] *[[680年]] *[[740年]] *[[800年]] *[[860年]] *[[920年]] *[[980年]] | *[[1040年]] *[[1100年]] *[[1160年]] *[[1220年]] *[[1280年]] *[[1340年]] *[[1400年]] *[[1460年]] *[[1520年]] *[[1580年]] *[[1640年]] *[[1700年]] *[[1760年]] *[[1820年]] *[[1880年]] *[[1940年]] *[[2000年]] | *[[2060年]] *[[2120年]] *[[2180年]] *[[2240年]] *[[2300年]] *[[2360年]] *[[2420年]] *[[2480年]] *[[2540年]] *[[2600年]] *[[2660年]] *[[2720年]] *[[2780年]] *[[2840年]] *[[2900年]] *[[2960年]] |}
==庚辰の月== 西暦年の下1桁が0・5（十干が[[庚]]・[[乙]]）の年の[[3月]]が庚辰の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[清明]]から[[立夏]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==庚辰の日==
* [[神武天皇]]（[[日本]]の建国者・初代天皇）の誕生日。
===選日=== 庚辰の日は[[犯土|小土]]の3日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:庚辰]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:庚辰]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:庚辰]]

{{干支}} '''庚辰'''（かのえたつ、こうきんのたつ、こうしん）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの17番目で、前は[[己卯]]、次は[[辛巳]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[庚]]は陽の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[辰]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（土生金）である。
==庚辰の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って20が余る年が庚辰の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''庚辰の年''' |- ![[紀元前1千年紀]]!![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[紀元前941年]] *[[紀元前881年]] *[[紀元前821年]] *[[紀元前761年]] *[[紀元前701年]] *[[紀元前641年]] *[[紀元前581年]] *[[紀元前521年]] *[[紀元前461年]] *[[紀元前401年]] *[[紀元前341年]] *[[紀元前281年]] *[[紀元前221年]] *[[紀元前161年]] *[[紀元前101年]] *[[紀元前41年]] | *[[20年]] *[[80年]] *[[140年]] *[[200年]] *[[260年]] *[[320年]] *[[380年]] *[[440年]] *[[500年]] *[[560年]] *[[620年]] *[[680年]] *[[740年]] *[[800年]] *[[860年]] *[[920年]] *[[980年]] | *[[1040年]] *[[1100年]] *[[1160年]] *[[1220年]] *[[1280年]] *[[1340年]] *[[1400年]] *[[1460年]] *[[1520年]] *[[1580年]] *[[1640年]] *[[1700年]] *[[1760年]] *[[1820年]] *[[1880年]] *[[1940年]] *[[2000年]] | *[[2060年]] *[[2120年]] *[[2180年]] *[[2240年]] *[[2300年]] *[[2360年]] *[[2420年]] *[[2480年]] *[[2540年]] *[[2600年]] *[[2660年]] *[[2720年]] *[[2780年]] *[[2840年]] *[[2900年]] *[[2960年]] |}
==庚辰の月== 西暦年の下1桁が0・5（十干が[[庚]]・[[乙]]）の年の[[3月]]が庚辰の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[清明]]から[[立夏]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==庚辰の日==
* [[神武天皇]]（[[日本]]の建国者・初代天皇）の誕生日。
===選日=== 庚辰の日は[[犯土|小土]]の3日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:庚辰]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:庚辰]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:MAINSPACE]] [[ja:庚辰]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Dragon|kanji=Yang Metal Dragon}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Metal Dragon also known as 庚辰'''（かのえたつ、こうきんのたつ、こうしん）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの17番目で、前は[[己卯]]、次は[[辛巳]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[庚]]は陽の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[辰]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（土生金）である。
==庚辰の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って20が余る年が庚辰の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''庚辰の年''' |- ![[紀元前1千年紀]]!![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[紀元前941年]] *[[紀元前881年]] *[[紀元前821年]] *[[紀元前761年]] *[[紀元前701年]] *[[紀元前641年]] *[[紀元前581年]] *[[紀元前521年]] *[[紀元前461年]] *[[紀元前401年]] *[[紀元前341年]] *[[紀元前281年]] *[[紀元前221年]] *[[紀元前161年]] *[[紀元前101年]] *[[紀元前41年]] | *[[20年]] *[[80年]] *[[140年]] *[[200年]] *[[260年]] *[[320年]] *[[380年]] *[[440年]] *[[500年]] *[[560年]] *[[620年]] *[[680年]] *[[740年]] *[[800年]] *[[860年]] *[[920年]] *[[980年]] | *[[1040年]] *[[1100年]] *[[1160年]] *[[1220年]] *[[1280年]] *[[1340年]] *[[1400年]] *[[1460年]] *[[1520年]] *[[1580年]] *[[1640年]] *[[1700年]] *[[1760年]] *[[1820年]] *[[1880年]] *[[1940年]] *[[2000年]] | *[[2060年]] *[[2120年]] *[[2180年]] *[[2240年]] *[[2300年]] *[[2360年]] *[[2420年]] *[[2480年]] *[[2540年]] *[[2600年]] *[[2660年]] *[[2720年]] *[[2780年]] *[[2840年]] *[[2900年]] *[[2960年]] |}
==庚辰の月== 西暦年の下1桁が0・5（十干が[[庚]]・[[乙]]）の年の[[3月]]が庚辰の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[清明]]から[[立夏]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==庚辰の日==
* [[神武天皇]]（[[日本]]の建国者・初代天皇）の誕生日。
===選日=== 庚辰の日は[[犯土|小土]]の3日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:庚辰]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:庚辰]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Metal Dragon}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[ja:庚辰]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Metal Dragon]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yang Metal Dragon]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Metal Dragon]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Metal Dragon]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Metal Dragon]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Metal Dragon]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Metal Dragon]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Metal Dragon]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]][[ja:Yang Metal Dragon]][[Category:11]] [[Category:trimming off this bad category]][[sn:Yang Metal Dragon]][[Category:trimming off this bad category]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Metal Dragon]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:Yang Metal Dragon]]

==庚辰の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って20が余る年が庚辰の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''庚辰の年''' |- ![[紀元前1千年紀]]!![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[紀元前941年]] *[[紀元前881年]] *[[紀元前821年]] *[[紀元前761年]] *[[紀元前701年]] *[[紀元前641年]] *[[紀元前581年]] *[[紀元前521年]] *[[紀元前461年]] *[[紀元前401年]] *[[紀元前341年]] *[[紀元前281年]] *[[紀元前221年]] *[[紀元前161年]] *[[紀元前101年]] *[[紀元前41年]] | *[[20年]] *[[80年]] *[[140年]] *[[200年]] *[[260年]] *[[320年]] *[[380年]] *[[440年]] *[[500年]] *[[560年]] *[[620年]] *[[680年]] *[[740年]] *[[800年]] *[[860年]] *[[920年]] *[[980年]] | *[[1040年]] *[[1100年]] *[[1160年]] *[[1220年]] *[[1280年]] *[[1340年]] *[[1400年]] *[[1460年]] *[[1520年]] *[[1580年]] *[[1640年]] *[[1700年]] *[[1760年]] *[[1820年]] *[[1880年]] *[[1940年]] *[[2000年]] | *[[2060年]] *[[2120年]] *[[2180年]] *[[2240年]] *[[2300年]] *[[2360年]] *[[2420年]] *[[2480年]] *[[2540年]] *[[2600年]] *[[2660年]] *[[2720年]] *[[2780年]] *[[2840年]] *[[2900年]] *[[2960年]] |}
==庚辰の月== 西暦年の下1桁が0・5（十干が[[庚]]・[[乙]]）の年の[[3月]]が庚辰の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[清明]]から[[立夏]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==庚辰の日==
* [[神武天皇]]（[[日本]]の建国者・初代天皇）の誕生日。
===選日=== 庚辰の日は[[犯土|小土]]の3日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:庚辰]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:庚辰]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Metal Dragon]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[ja:庚辰]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:庚辰]][[zh:庚辰]][[ko:경진]][[fr:Dragon de métal]][[de:Metall-Drache]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[ja:庚辰]][[zh:庚辰]][[ko:경진]][[fr:Dragon de métal]][[de:Metall-Drache]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:庚辰]][[zh:庚辰]][[ko:경진]][[fr:Dragon de métal]][[de:Metall-Drache]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:庚辰]][[zh:庚辰]][[ko:경진]][[fr:Dragon de métal]][[de:Metall-Drache]][[Category:qq]][[ja:庚辰]][[zh:庚辰]][[ko:경진]][[fr:Dragon de métal]][[de:Metall-Drache]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:庚辰]][[zh:庚辰]][[ko:경진]][[fr:Dragon de métal]][[de:Metall-Drache]][[Category:qq]][[ja:庚辰]][[zh:庚辰]][[ko:경진]][[fr:Dragon de métal]][[de:Metall-Drache]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:庚辰]][[zh:庚辰]][[ko:경진]][[fr:Dragon de métal]][[de:Metall-Drache]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]][[ja:Yang Metal Dragon]][[Category:11]] [[Category:trimming off this bad category]][[ja:庚辰]][[zh:庚辰]][[ko:경진]][[fr:Dragon de métal]][[de:Metall-Drache]][[Category:trimming off this bad category]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:庚辰]][[zh:庚辰]][[ko:경진]][[fr:Dragon de métal]][[de:Metall-Drache]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:Yang Metal Dragon]] [[ja:庚辰]][[zh:庚辰]][[ko:경진]][[fr:Dragon de métal]][[de:Metall-Drache]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Dragon|kanji=庚辰|romaji=kanoe tatsu|onyomi=kōshin|p=gēngchén|w=keng-ch'en|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ ʈ͡ʂʰən|y=geng1 san4|j=geng1 san4|ci=kɪŋ sɐn|mc=kæŋ ɖin|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ɖiŋ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Metal Dragon also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 庚辰'''（かのえたつ、こうきんのたつ、こうしん）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの17番目で、前は[[己卯]]、次は[[辛巳]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[庚]]は陽の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[辰]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（土生金）である。
==庚辰の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って20が余る年が庚辰の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''庚辰の年''' |- ![[紀元前1千年紀]]!![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[紀元前941年]] *[[紀元前881年]] *[[紀元前821年]] *[[紀元前761年]] *[[紀元前701年]] *[[紀元前641年]] *[[紀元前581年]] *[[紀元前521年]] *[[紀元前461年]] *[[紀元前401年]] *[[紀元前341年]] *[[紀元前281年]] *[[紀元前221年]] *[[紀元前161年]] *[[紀元前101年]] *[[紀元前41年]] | *[[20年]] *[[80年]] *[[140年]] *[[200年]] *[[260年]] *[[320年]] *[[380年]] *[[440年]] *[[500年]] *[[560年]] *[[620年]] *[[680年]] *[[740年]] *[[800年]] *[[860年]] *[[920年]] *[[980年]] | *[[1040年]] *[[1100年]] *[[1160年]] *[[1220年]] *[[1280年]] *[[1340年]] *[[1400年]] *[[1460年]] *[[1520年]] *[[1580年]] *[[1640年]] *[[1700年]] *[[1760年]] *[[1820年]] *[[1880年]] *[[1940年]] *[[2000年]] | *[[2060年]] *[[2120年]] *[[2180年]] *[[2240年]] *[[2300年]] *[[2360年]] *[[2420年]] *[[2480年]] *[[2540年]] *[[2600年]] *[[2660年]] *[[2720年]] *[[2780年]] *[[2840年]] *[[2900年]] *[[2960年]] |}
==庚辰の月== 西暦年の下1桁が0・5（十干が[[庚]]・[[乙]]）の年の[[3月]]が庚辰の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[清明]]から[[立夏]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==庚辰の日==
* [[神武天皇]]（[[日本]]の建国者・初代天皇）の誕生日。

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062146]] Wikidata name: Yang Metal Dragon [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Dragon|kanji=庚辰|romaji=kanoe tatsu|onyomi=kōshin|p=gēngchén|w=keng-ch'en|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ ʈ͡ʂʰən|y=geng1 san4|j=geng1 san4|ci=kɪŋ sɐn|mc=kæŋ ɖin|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ɖiŋ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Metal Dragon also known as 庚辰''' (kanoetatsu, koukinnotatsu, koushin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 17th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinshi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|辛巳|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=辛巳|4=zh|5=辛巳|6=ko|7=신사 (간지)|lt_ko=신사|8=fr|9=Serpent de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol ==Months of Yang Metal Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Dragon== * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] (the founder and first [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]])'s birthday.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 17th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinshi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|辛巳|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=辛巳|4=zh|5=辛巳|6=ko|7=신사 (간지)|lt_ko=신사|8=fr|9=Serpent de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Metal Dragon (庚辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongjin (경진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Thìn

==Months of Yang Metal Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Dragon== * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] (the founder and first [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]])'s birthday.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 17th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinshi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|辛巳|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=辛巳|4=zh|5=辛巳|6=ko|7=신사 (간지)|lt_ko=신사|8=fr|9=Serpent de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}}. ==Months of Yang Metal Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Dragon== * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] (the founder and first [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]])'s birthday.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

==Months of Yang Metal Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Dragon== * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] (the founder and first [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]])'s birthday.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

==Months of Yang Metal Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Dragon== * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] (the founder and first [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]])'s birthday.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

==Months of Yang Metal Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Dragon== * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] (the founder and first [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]])'s birthday.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

==Months of Yang Metal Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Dragon== * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] (the founder and first [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]])'s birthday.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

==Months of Yang Metal Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Dragon== * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] (the founder and first [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]])'s birthday.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements ==Months of Yang Metal Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Dragon== * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] (the founder and first [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]])'s birthday.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 17th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinshi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|辛巳|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=辛巳|4=zh|5=辛巳|6=ko|7=신사 (간지)|lt_ko=신사|8=fr|9=Serpent de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements It is the 17th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinshi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|辛巳|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=辛巳|4=zh|5=辛巳|6=ko|7=신사 (간지)|lt_ko=신사|8=fr|9=Serpent de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Metal Dragon (庚辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongjin (경진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Metal Dragon (庚辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gang1 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのえたつ (kanoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうかのたつ (kōka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうしん (kōshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyeongjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Metal Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 20 when divided by 60 is a year of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:Year|year]]). {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yang Metal Dragon (庚辰)'s years table''' |- ! ==Months of Yang Metal Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Dragon== * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] (the founder and first [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]])'s birthday.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

==Months of Yang Metal Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Dragon== * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] (the founder and first [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]])'s birthday.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 17th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinshi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|辛巳|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=辛巳|4=zh|5=辛巳|6=ko|7=신사 (간지)|lt_ko=신사|8=fr|9=Serpent de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang ==Months of Yang Metal Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Dragon== * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] (the founder and first [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]])'s birthday.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 17th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinshi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|辛巳|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=辛巳|4=zh|5=辛巳|6=ko|7=신사 (간지)|lt_ko=신사|8=fr|9=Serpent de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe ==Months of Yang Metal Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Dragon== * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] (the founder and first [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]])'s birthday.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 17th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinshi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|辛巳|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=辛巳|4=zh|5=辛巳|6=ko|7=신사 (간지)|lt_ko=신사|8=fr|9=Serpent de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe ==Months of Yang Metal Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.

==Months of Yang Metal Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Dragon== * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] (the founder and first [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]])'s birthday.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

==Months of Yang Metal Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Dragon== * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] (the founder and first [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]])'s birthday.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

==Months of Yang Metal Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Dragon== * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] (the founder and first [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]])'s birthday.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaaldraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gĕng-sìng]][[de:Metall-Drache]][[fr:Dragon de métal]][[hak:Kâng-sìn]][[ja:庚辰]][[ko:경진]][[nds:Metall-Draken]][[vi:Canh Thìn]][[za:Gengsaenz]][[zh-min-nan:Keng-sîn]][[zh-yue:庚辰]][[zh:庚辰]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062146]] Wikidata name: Yang Metal Dragon [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Dragon|kanji=庚辰|romaji=kanoe tatsu|onyomi=kōshin|p=gēngchén|w=keng-ch'en|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ ʈ͡ʂʰən|y=geng1 san4|j=geng1 san4|ci=kɪŋ sɐn|mc=kæŋ ɖin|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ɖiŋ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Metal Dragon also known as 庚辰''' (kanoetatsu, koukinnotatsu, koushin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 17th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinshi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|辛巳|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=辛巳|4=zh|5=辛巳|6=ko|7=신사 (간지)|lt_ko=신사|8=fr|9=Serpent de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang ==Months of Yang Metal Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Dragon== * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] (the founder and first [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]])'s birthday.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 17th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinshi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|辛巳|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=辛巳|4=zh|5=辛巳|6=ko|7=신사 (간지)|lt_ko=신사|8=fr|9=Serpent de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements ==Months of Yang Metal Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Dragon== * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] (the founder and first [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]])'s birthday.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaaldraak (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gĕng-sìng]][[de:Metall-Drache]][[fr:Dragon de métal]][[hak:Kâng-sìn]][[ja:庚辰]][[ko:경진]][[nds:Metall-Draken]][[vi:Canh Thìn]][[za:Gengsaenz]][[zh-min-nan:Keng-sîn]][[zh-yue:庚辰]][[zh:庚辰]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062146]] Wikidata name: Yang Metal Dragon [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Dragon|kanji=庚辰|romaji=kanoe tatsu|onyomi=kōshin|p=gēngchén|w=keng-ch'en|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ ʈ͡ʂʰən|y=geng1 san4|j=geng1 san4|ci=kɪŋ sɐn|mc=kæŋ ɖin|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ɖiŋ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Metal Dragon also known as 庚辰''' (kanoetatsu, koukinnotatsu, koushin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 17th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinshi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|辛巳|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=辛巳|4=zh|5=辛巳|6=ko|7=신사 (간지)|lt_ko=신사|8=fr|9=Serpent de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо Metal).

It is the 17th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinshi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|辛巳|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=辛巳|4=zh|5=辛巳|6=ko|7=신사 (간지)|lt_ko=신사|8=fr|9=Serpent de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang Metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Metal Dragon (庚辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-tatsu ***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-tatsu ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongjin (경진) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Thìn
<!-- == * Yang Metal Dragon (庚辰) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngchén ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gang1 san4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: かのえたつ (kanoe-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうかのたつ (kōka-no-tatsu) ***Onyomi: こうしん (kōshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyeongjin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Thìn
--> ==Years of Yang Metal Dragon== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 20 when divided by 60 is a year of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:Year|year]]). {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yang Metal Dragon (庚辰)'s years table''' |- ! ==Months of Yang Metal Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Dragon== * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] (the founder and first [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]])'s birthday.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

==Months of Yang Metal Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Dragon== * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] (the founder and first [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]])'s birthday.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

==Months of Yang Metal Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Dragon== * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] (the founder and first [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]])'s birthday.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 17th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kibou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rabbit|2=ja|己卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinshi|ja|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|辛巳|1=Yin Metal Snake|2=ja|3=辛巳|4=zh|5=辛巳|6=ko|7=신사 (간지)|lt_ko=신사|8=fr|9=Serpent de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Schlange|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinshi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Snake|qq=}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang ==Months of Yang Metal Dragon== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:March|March]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]] until the day before [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Dragon== * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Emperor Jimmu]] (the founder and first [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] of [[:en:Japan|Japan]])'s birthday.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Metal Dragon|2=ja|庚辰|1=Yang Metal Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.
